ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who filed the claim */,
  "benefit_type" INTEGER /* Type of benefit (e.g., IB, ESA, UC) */,
  "claim_type" INTEGER /* Type of claim (e.g., New, Rerefferal) */,
  "requirements" INTEGER /* Requirements for the claim (e.g., interpreter, taxi) */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the claim (e.g., Booked, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "claim_amount" TEXT /* Amount claimed */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was filed */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was resolved */,
  "claim_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the claim */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to process the claim */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the claim was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the claim was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_requirements FOREIGN KEY ("requirements") REFERENCES requirements ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_claim_type FOREIGN KEY ("claim_type") REFERENCES claim_types ("claim_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_benefit_type FOREIGN KEY ("benefit_type") REFERENCES benefits ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit (e.g., IB, ESA, UC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the benefit */,
  "maximum_amount" TEXT /* Maximum amount that can be claimed under the benefit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the benefit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the benefit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_types" (
  "claim_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim type */,
  "claim_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the claim type (e.g., New, Rerefferal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the claim type */,
  "processing_time" INTEGER /* Average processing time for the claim type in days */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the claim type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the claim type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the requirement (e.g., Interpreter, Taxi) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the requirement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the requirement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the requirement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Booked, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the claim for which the appointment is booked */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the appointment */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the appointment in minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the appointment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the appointment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer service representative, claims processor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the claim */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the claim for which the communication is related */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer with whom the communication is made */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  "communication_method" TEXT /* Method of communication (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the communication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the communication was logged */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the communication was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the claim for which the resource is needed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., Interpreter, Taxi) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., Booked, Available) */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider of the resource */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)
